title: ka'ab #3510
definition:
1) to be in pain, be sore, have pain, be sorrowful
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be in pain (physical)
        1a2) to be in pain (mental)
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to cause pain, hurt, mar
        1b2) pain, mar (participle)
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal)

    NASB:  to be in pain
